char.name: Pildan
char.bio: A Philistine farmer near Timnah. My neighbor is that Israelite strongman, Samson, and let me tell you, life near that man is NEVER dull. Foxes with torches in my grain, a thousand of our soldiers down with the jawbone of a donkey... I just want a quiet harvest. Is that too much to ask?? 🦊
